name: Sugared Walnuts. (Dion)
recipeInstructions:
1. Put walnuts in a large bowl.
2. Add egg whites to the bowl and coat the walnuts thoroughly.
3. Mix together sugar and cinnamon.
4. Combine the sugar and cinnamon mixture with the coated walnuts, stirring well.
5. Spread the mixture evenly on a greased cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 325°F for 30-40 minutes or until cooled.
7. Break into pieces once cool and enjoy.
